results.title: El Nino emerges in Pacific raising global heat concerns; Will it impact India?
results.description: The weather experts across the globe now had been warning that El Niño could be on steroids. Some even said that it could like a “Godzilla event” , which, given its historical spoor, would have massive social and economic consequences in southern Africa.

results.title: Quote of the day by Satya Nadella: ‘We will quickly lose even the social permission to actually take something like...'
results.description: Satya Nadella says that AI must deliver meaningful benefits in healthcare, education, governance and business. Society will continue supporting AI only when its energy consumption and technological advancement result in tangible improvements that enhance human well-being and economic progress.

results.title: Indian judiciary promotes mediation as robust dispute resolution mechanism: CJI Surya Kant
results.description: Chief Justice of India Surya Kant highlighted mediation as a strong dispute resolution mechanism during a London panel discussion. He said India has widely promoted mediation through judicial initiatives and the Mediation Act, 2023, while stressing its advantages over prolonged litigation

results.title: Group clash over scrap contract, miscreants open fire
results.description: A clash broke out between two groups in the Bilaspur area on Wednesday over a manpower supply contract, resembling a scene from a movie. Dozens of miscreants arrived in multiple vehicles to seize the contract for a major company. They not only opened fire but also smashed four vehicles. The miscreants fled the scene after [...]

results.title: Supreme Court Calls Homemakers ‘Nation Builders’, Recognises Economic Value of Unpaid Domestic Work
results.description: The Supreme Court has made a substantial ruling, asserting that the term “homemaker” inadequately represents the contributions of women managing households. The court noted that these women’s roles extend far beyond traditional domestic duties, primarily contributing to family development, nurturing future generations, and promoting national progress. A bench led by Justice Sanjay Karol observed that [...] The post Supreme Court Calls Homemakers ‘Nation Builders’, Recognises Economic Value of Unpaid Domestic Work appeared first on The CSR Journal .

results.title: Police find 2 missing migrant Sisters
results.description: ਲਾਪਤਾ ਹੋਈਆਂ ਧੀਆਂ ਮਿਲਣ ਤੋਂ ਬਾਅਦ ਖੁਸ਼ੀ 'ਚ ਪਿਤਾ ਨੇ ਪੰਜਾਬ ਪੁਲਿਸ ਦਾ ਧੰਨਵਾਦ ਕੀਤਾ ਅਤੇ ਸਿਰੋਪਾਓ ਭੇਂਟ ਕਰ ਕੇ ਮੁੰਹ ਮੀਠਾ ਕਰਵਾਇਆ।
